inputs.label: Initial Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the rocket at launch, including propellant (wet mass).

inputs.label: Final Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the rocket after propellant is expended (dry mass).

inputs.label: Specific Impulse
inputs.businessContext: Engine efficiency: thrust per weight flow rate of propellant at Earth's surface.

inputs.label: Standard Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity, used to convert specific impulse to exhaust velocity.
